_comment: Relay project MCP servers. Committed. Secrets resolved from .env via ${VAR} interpolation at runtime.

playwright._purpose: Used by extension dev (autofill testing) and by relay-extension-auditor for headless verification.

postgres._purpose: Read-only inspection of local PG 5433 (relay DB). Used by relay-migration-guardian for schema queries.

filesystem._purpose: Filesystem ops scoped to project root only — prevents accidental access to ~/.ssh, ~/.aws etc.
